message:
perf(combinator,types): pre-allocate collections and migrate registries to HashMap

Combinator pre-allocations:
- bulkhead.rs: BulkheadRegistry now initializes its internal HashMap with
  capacity 16 (DEFAULT_BULKHEAD_REGISTRY_CAPACITY) instead of default 0,
  avoiding rehash storms as the first bulkheads are registered.
  `all_metrics()` switched from iterator-collect to explicit loop with
  `HashMap::with_capacity(bulkheads.len())` and explicit `drop(bulkheads)`
  to release the read lock before returning.
- join.rs: `join_all_outcomes()` pre-allocates the successes Vec to
  `outcomes.len()`, eliminating reallocations in the common case where
  most or all branches succeed.
- select.rs: `SelectAllDrain::poll()` pre-allocates the `also_ready` Vec
  to `futures.len() - 1`, covering the worst case where all remaining
  futures resolve in the same poll.

TypeRegistry migration (typed_symbol.rs):
- `types: BTreeMap<TypeId, TypeDescriptor>` → `HashMap` with capacity 16
  TypeId has no meaningful ordering, so BTreeMap's sorted iteration was
  unused overhead. HashMap gives O(1) lookups for type resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
